moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final 2026
moments.blurb: The FIFA Men's World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with the final match between Spain and Argentina in the USA.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It's the ultimate showdown! Spain face Argentina in the FIFA World Cup Final this Sunday. Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: Four years of waiting, all for this. The World Cup Final is just days away! Get ready for Sunday's massive game.

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: Glasgow hosts the Commonwealth Games 2026, with over 3,000 athletes competing across various sports from July 23rd to August 2nd.

angles.name: Games Kick Off
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games arrive in Glasgow next week! Get ready for 11 days of incredible athletic talent and competition.

angles.name: Scottish Sporting Pride
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games 2026! Who are you excited to cheer on?

moments.title: The Open at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale concludes this weekend, with the final rounds taking place today and tomorrow.

angles.name: Golf Grand Finale
angles.copy: It's moving day at The Open! Who will make their charge at Royal Birkdale this weekend?

angles.name: Championship Sunday
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is on the line! Catch all the drama from the final day of The Open at Royal Birkdale tomorrow.

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, featuring world-class track and field athletes, takes place this Saturday, July 18th at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Track & Field Stars
angles.copy: World-class athletics comes to London this Saturday! Don't miss the London Athletics Meet for a dose of sporting greatness.

angles.name: London Stadium Action
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious speed and skill! The London Athletics Meet is on this weekend at the London Stadium.

moments.title: BBC Proms Season Begins
moments.blurb: The world's biggest classical music festival, the BBC Proms, returns to the Royal Albert Hall starting tomorrow, July 17th.

angles.name: First Night
angles.copy: The First Night of the Proms is tomorrow! Dive into eight weeks of incredible classical music from the Royal Albert Hall.

angles.name: Classical Summer
angles.copy: Summer isn't just for pop! The BBC Proms kicks off tomorrow, bringing the finest classical music to London and beyond.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival takes over Wollaton Park this weekend, July 18-19, with a line-up of pop and rock artists.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is HERE! Nottingham's Wollaton Park will be buzzing with live music this Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Who's heading to Splendour Festival this weekend? Get ready for two days of amazing pop and rock acts!

moments.title: Latitude Festival
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a diverse music and arts event, returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off next week! Who's excited for four days of music, comedy, and arts in Suffolk?

angles.name: Arts & Music Escape
angles.copy: Planning your Latitude adventure? Henham Park awaits for a diverse weekend of creativity and live performances!

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival
moments.blurb: The UK's highest rock festival, Steelhouse, takes place in the Brecon Beacons from July 24-26, featuring legendary and emerging rock artists.

angles.name: Rocking the Beacons
angles.copy: Get ready to rock the Brecon Beacons! Steelhouse Festival brings three days of heavy riffs and live music next weekend.

angles.name: Wales' Loudest Festival
angles.copy: Steelhouse Festival is back! Who's heading to the Brecon Beacons for a weekend of pure rock energy?

moments.title: Bruno Mars at Wembley
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars brings 'The Romantic Tour' to Wembley Stadium for two nights this weekend, July 18th and 19th.

angles.name: Wembley's Romantic Weekend
angles.copy: Bruno Mars takes over Wembley Stadium this weekend! Get ready for 'The Romantic Tour' on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Pop Superstar Live
angles.copy: Who's got tickets to see Bruno Mars at Wembley? Two nights of hits and smooth moves await!

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The Love Island 2026 series concludes with its grand final on Monday, July 27th, on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Summer of Love Ends
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Love Island 2026 final is confirmed for Monday 27th July. Who do you think will win?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until the Love Island final! Get your theories ready – who's your winning couple?

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever on Netflix
moments.blurb: The final film in the 'Heartstopper' series, 'Heartstopper Forever', premieres globally on Netflix tomorrow, July 17th.

angles.name: Heartstopper Finale
angles.copy: Get ready for the emotional finale! 'Heartstopper Forever' drops on Netflix tomorrow. Have you got your tissues ready?

angles.name: New On Netflix
angles.copy: The highly anticipated 'Heartstopper Forever' arrives on Netflix tomorrow! Perfect for a weekend binge.

moments.title: Ann Droid, New BBC Comedy
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new quirky BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premieres tomorrow, July 17th.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan's new comedy 'Ann Droid' starts tomorrow on BBC! Expect witty observations and an unlikely friendship.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Need a new laugh? 'Ann Droid' with Diane Morgan premieres tomorrow on the BBC. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland's 74th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the iconic Stewart Copeland! What's your favourite Police track featuring his incredible drumming?

angles.name: The Police Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Stewart Copeland's 74th today! A true pioneer of rock drumming. Turn up some Police in his honour!

moments.title: Wizkid's 36th Birthday
moments.blurb: Nigerian global superstar Wizkid, known for his Afrobeats and R&B hits, turns 36 today, July 16th.

angles.name: Afrobeats Icon
angles.copy: Big 3-6 for Wizkid today! Celebrate the Afrobeats superstar by blasting his biggest tracks.

angles.name: Starboy's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to Wizkid! What's your favourite track from the Grammy-winning artist?

moments.title: Luke Hemmings' 30th Birthday
moments.blurb: 5 Seconds of Summer frontman and solo artist Luke Hemmings celebrates his 30th birthday today, July 16th.

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman Turns 30
angles.copy: Huge happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings of 5 Seconds of Summer! Celebrate with his best hits.

angles.name: Celebrating Luke
angles.copy: Wishing Luke Hemmings a very Happy 30th Birthday today! What's your favourite 5SOS or solo track?

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin rhythms, turns 79 on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a guitar legend! Carlos Santana turns 79 this Monday. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Monday marks Carlos Santana's 79th birthday! Turn up the volume and enjoy his iconic sound.

moments.title: UK Summer Weather Continues
moments.blurb: High pressure continues to dominate the UK weather for the next 10 days, bringing largely dry, warm, and sunny conditions, with high UV levels.

angles.name: Sunny Outlook
angles.copy: More sunshine on the way! High pressure means largely dry and warm conditions across the UK for the next 10 days. Don't forget the sunscreen!

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Making the most of the summer weather? It's staying warm and sunny for a while yet, but remember those high UV levels!
